stainProtocols.description: Derived from U. Kentucky ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jul 15, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Standard histology.

regionProtocols.name: U. Kentucky — Posterior hippocampus
regionProtocols.description: From U. Kentucky ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jul 15, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP-43. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

notes: P62 / CD68 / other survey stains may not have Pitt schema stain types — see region descriptions.
Antibody fields that only say phospho/non-phospho are resolved from vendor/clone columns.
Regions marked Not Collected in the survey are omitted.
